sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ الْقُرْآنُ الْكَرِيمُ بِلُغَةٍ عَرَبِيَّةٍ رَاقِيَةٍ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Časni Kur'an se odlikuje veoma profinjenim arapskim jezikom.
sentences.translationEn: The Holy Quran is characterized by a very sophisticated Arabic language.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ مِنْهُ الْأُدَبَاءُ كَيْفِيَّةَ اخْتِيَارِ الْكَلِمَاتِ الدَّقِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Književnici iz njega uče kako odabrati precizne riječi.
sentences.translationEn: Writers learn from it how to choose precise words.

sentences.arabic: الْأُسْلُوبُ الْقُرْآنِيُّ يُؤَثِّرُ فِي كُلِّ مَنْ يَقْرَؤُهُ أَوْ يَسْمَعُهُ.
sentences.translation: Kur'anski stil utiče na svakoga ko ga čita ili sluša.
sentences.translationEn: The Quranic style affects everyone who reads or hears it.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ مَصْدَرُ الْإِلْهَامِ لِلشُّعَرَاءِ وَالْكُتَّابِ عَبْرَ الْعُصُورِ.
sentences.translation: On je izvor inspiracije za pjesnike i pisce kroz vijekove.
sentences.translationEn: It is the source of inspiration for poets and writers throughout the ages.

sentences.arabic: اللُّغَةُ الْفُصْحَى بَقِيَتْ قَوِيَّةً بِفَضْلِ هَذَا النَّصِّ الْمُقَدَّسِ.
sentences.translation: Književni jezik je ostao snažan zahvaljujući ovom svetom tekstu.
sentences.translationEn: The formal language remained strong thanks to this sacred text.
